name: Boz Scaggs
abstract: William Royce "Boz" Scaggs (born June 8, 1944) is an American singer, songwriter, and guitarist. He was a bandmate of Steve Miller in the Ardells in the early 1960s and a member of the Steve Miller Band from 1967 to 1968.

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: I did a tour with Boz Scaggs with Jeff Porcaro for the first month of the tour we were playing double drums with Jeff Porcaro
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023
